_comment: Manual pass: high-energy (stadium) sections, per song slug. Each selector is a section header exactly as on the Genius page; add @n to target only the nth occurrence (1-based, e.g. "[Coro: Bad Bunny]@2"), otherwise all occurrences match. Rendered with the energy accent, winning over the chorus accent. The entries below are real examples from badbunny2026; entries whose slug is not in songs.py are ignored, so replace them at will.
